headline: Stay informed with the top movers within the S&P500 index on Wednesday.
summary: Let's have a look at the top S&P500 gainers and losers one hour before the close of the markets of today's session.

headline: Prediction markets' new insider trading restrictions aren't enough, bipartisan senators say
summary: Sens. Adam Schiff, D-Calif., and John Curtis, R-Utah, said they are optimistic their bill has enough bipartisan support to pass in Congress.
